generated_note:
**Subjective**
**Chief Complaint**
Kevin has been struggling to breathe for the last couple of weeks.

**History of Present Illness**
Kevin came in because he's been struggling to breathe for the last couple of weeks. He describes chest tightness, especially at night, and has been using his rescue inhaler (albuterol) way more than usual — he said four or five times a week, maybe more, and actually used it twice just yesterday. He mentioned his asthma was this bad maybe two years ago, and interestingly, it was around the same time of year — right when spring starts and pollen season kicks in. So seasonal triggers are definitely a pattern for him. He also endorsed upper respiratory symptoms — runny nose, sneezing, postnasal drip — he thought it was just allergies. He takes Claritin occasionally but not consistently.

He describes chest tightness, especially at night, and has been using his rescue inhaler (albuterol) way more than usual — he said four or five times a week, maybe more, and actually used it twice just yesterday. He mentioned his asthma was this bad maybe two years ago, and interestingly, it was around the same time of year — right when spring starts and pollen season kicks in. So seasonal triggers are definitely a pattern for him. He also endorsed upper respiratory symptoms — runny nose, sneezing, postnasal drip — he thought it was just allergies. He takes Claritin occasionally but not consistently.
